Complete Your Order
Your Order
All stickers are 50MM
When you're ready to pay here's what you need to know
On the Revolut page, type in the CORRECT amount of GBP it costs, then in the notes bit write your order and your shipping details.
When you click "Pay Via Revolut" you will have to type in your email — please type it in without any mistakes or your order might not go through, and we will email you asking for your shipping details.
